title: Extension to H-free graphs
statement_text: Determine the maximum possible number of edges of an $H$-free graph on $n$ vertices with matching number at most $s$, for general forbidden subgraphs $H$ (extending Theorem 1.1 beyond the case $H = K_{k+1}$).
context_text: At the opening of Section 3, the authors note it may be interesting to extend Theorem 1.1 by replacing the forbidden clique $K_{k+1}$ by other forbidden subgraphs $H$. Proposition 3.1 settles this for color-critical $H$ when $s$ and $n$ are sufficiently large, but the problem for general $H$ (including non-color-critical graphs and small parameters) remains open.
notes: No labeled environment; posed as a research direction at the start of Section 3, partially addressed by Proposition 3.1 in the same section.
paper_title: Turán graphs with bounded matching number
